title: paraphlomis javanica var. angustifolia
intro: Paraphlomis javanica var. angustifolia, also known as 'nastina', is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its slender leaves and distinctive fragrance. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paraphlomis javanica var. angustifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
